title: rubus gelertii
intro: Rubus gelertii, also known as Snow Raspberry or Welsh Raspberry, is a rare and endangered species of flowering plant in the rose family. It is a small, deciduous shrub native to the mountainous regions of North Wales, characterized by white flowers and edible red fruits. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce pain and inflammation, and fight off infections. The health benefits of Rubus gelertii include its ability to boost the immune system, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antioxidant properties, and it can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for medicinal purposes.
